title: SMP Modpack+
description: A SMP Qol and Performance based modpack designed for smooth, stable, and lag-free Experience.
body:
## SMP Modpack

A SMP Qol and Performance based modpack designed for **smooth, stable, and lag-free** Experience.

## Features
- Smooth,lag-free,stablized Gameplay,
- Lightweight Mods,
- Quality of life mods,
- Useful mods for SMP's
- Better PVP and SMP Experience
- helpful texture packs
- Better visuals,
- Wide acess for customization,


<details>
<summary>MODS Included</summary>
